summary: Solid show with a stellar jam into Playing in the Band, but a sluggish This Comes A Time; recording quality not described
review: The performance is highlighted by an incredible, delicate jam that rockets back into Playing in the Band, offering a soaring outer‑space vibe. However, the reviewer felt This Comes A Time was unusually slow and somewhat disappointing. No details about the source or sound quality were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review gives a 4‑star overall rating, praising the jam but criticizing one song; lack of recording info keeps the technical score modest.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not comment on soundboard vs. audience or clarity; no specific audio quality remarks.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set starts with a very slow This Comes A Time, then lifts off into an exquisite jam that segues into Playing in the Band, giving the concert an outer‑space feel.
